title: Sales Executive – Lab Instruments
description: We are looking for a motivated sales executive to join our team and drive growth in the laboratory equipment sector. Responsibilities include client acquisition, product demonstration, and sales target achievement.

title: Application Specialist - Life Sciences
description: Seeking an experienced application specialist to provide technical support and training for life science products. Responsibilities include customer training, application development, and technical troubleshooting.

title: Quality Control Engineer
description: Join our QA team to ensure the highest quality standards for our laboratory equipment. Responsibilities include product testing, quality documentation, and compliance with industry standards.
